Module 3: Introduction
!
Executive Summary
If you made it here to Module 3 you are now in the top 1% of the
entrepreneurial world - congratulations! Until now most of the content has
been conceptual and high level. Going forward we’re going to get into the
nitty-gritty.
You’ll learn exactly how PLF works and how it has created success for so
many PLF Owners. You’ll also see how all the pieces fit together and learn
all the hardcore concepts.
In Module 3 we’ll cover getting to the money fast.
• 	The two fastest and easiest types of launches: the Seed Launch and the
Quick Launch
• 	Seed Launch: you start with no list or product and you get paid to
create your product
• 	Quick Launch: you already have a list, offer, or product - it’s a way to
get a quick cash infusion that’s easy and fun
If you’re just starting out or want to test a new idea a Seed Launch works
very well
In the Business Launch Formula we mentioned there are 3 big guns in the
launch world: Seed Launch, Internal Launch, and JV Launch. A 4th
addition would be the Quick Launch.
!

-- 1 of 2 --

Remember this is about baby steps - taking small incremental steps that
add up to huge exponential change. For example, get the opt in up, publish
a blog post, get an email written, etc. No one is an instant success - it’s all
about these small steps.
One of the easiest baby steps you can take is getting involved in the
community. Encourage people, ask questions, and get involved.
In fact, you should leave a comment here on this video - just write a
comment now and say “Hey Jeff, I’m here!”. Lots of people have been
down this path before, and that’s all you need to do too.
Scroll down, leave a comment, and dig into this module. Once you get
through a module, go back through it again - repetition is the mother of all
learning.
All the hard work you did in Module 1 & 2 is about to start coming to
fruition.
!
